prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock **L7X 3.0L V6 (230 PS)** with a **Nismo-tuned L7X 3.2L stroker kit** (bored to 93mm, stroked to 78.4mm) using **JE Forged Pistons (11.5:1 CR)** and **Manley H-beam connecting rods**, paired with a **Tomei 272° camshaft** and **Ferrea 5000-series valves** for 320+ HP at 7,800 RPM.

Forced Induction: Install a **Garrett GT3076R turbocharger** (0.86 A/R turbine housing) with a **custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust manifold** (fabricated by **JP Racing**), mated to a **GReddy Type-S intercooler** and **HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve**. Boost set to **1.2 bar (17.4 PSI)** via **Apexi Power FC ECU** with **Motec M150 logging** for real-time tuning.

Suspension & Handling: Swap the stock **MacPherson struts** for **Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (2-way adjustable)** with **polyurethane bushings (SuperPro 62mm)** and **Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm)**. Fit **Brembo GT 6-piston calipers (355mm rotors front, 330mm rear)** with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** and **Goodridge G-Stop braided lines**.
estetica: Aero: Install a **Liberty Walk LB Works widebody kit** (Clio V6-specific) with **custom carbon fiber front splitter (3D-scanned for Phase 1 bumper)** and **Voltex GT-Wing (1,700mm span, 300mm height)**. Replace side mirrors with **Seibon carbon fiber units** and add **custom aluminum rear diffuser (fabricated by RW Carbon)**.

Interior: Replace stock seats with **Recaro Pole Position II (Clio V6-specific mounts)** and **Sparco 6-point harnesses**. Install a **Momo Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, suede)** with **NRG quick-release hub**, paired with a **Defi BF gauge cluster (oil temp, boost, AFR)** and **custom aluminum shift knob (weighted, 3D-printed to match L7X gearbox ratios)**.

Lighting & Details: Retrofit **Osram Night Breaker Laser HID bulbs (6000K)** in **Hella DE projector headlights** with **custom LED angel eyes (Lux H8 V4)**. Paint calipers **Brembo Yellow** and wrap the car in **3M Gloss Black (2080 series)** with **matte carbon fiber hood (Seibon ST-R)** and **debadged rear hatch (custom vinyl overlay)**.
